reviews.comment:
Las atención está vez no me gustó, el playero se fue a un costado para usar el celular y se demoró demasiado siendo que tuve que esperar que terminara de atender, me hizo demorar más de la cuenta

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like the service this time. The attendant went to the side to use his cell phone and took too long, even though I had to wait for him to finish serving me. It made me wait longer than necessary.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLdUp6a2hnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atención  normal,siempre hay que esperar un tiempo importante por la cantidad de clientes y un sistema lento y antiguo de atender como en todas las estaciones de servicios

(Translated by Google)
Average service, but you always have to wait a significant amount of time due to the number of customers and a slow, outdated service system, just like at all gas stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLcU9LMXZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención por parte de los playeros y personal del local de comidas. Los baños y el resto de las instalaciones están limpios. Cuenta con varios surtidores para la carga de combustible y con tres estaciones para la carga y control de los neumáticos (esto evita que se acumulen vehículos  e interfieran a otros para la salida de la estación)

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the attendants and food staff. The restrooms and other facilities are clean. There are several fuel pumps and three stations for tire pressure monitoring and inspection (this prevents vehicles from backing up and blocking others from leaving the station).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLMzktWDZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. En general mucha gente porque es más barato que otras estaciones de servicio. Carga y control de aire de neumáticos gratuito

(Translated by Google)
Good service. It's usually busy because it's cheaper than other gas stations. Free tire pressure check and refueling.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLejhTMFlREAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre cargo ahí te atienden bien y voy a la noche que es rápido!!

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up there, they treat you well, and I go at night because it's quick!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLOV9TMDBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atienden muy bien, a veces un poco cargada de gente, pero buena nafta y la app para pagar

(Translated by Google)
They provide excellent service, sometimes it gets a bit crowded, but the gas is good and they have an app for paying.
